art_market.global_sales_outlook: Market resilience despite geopolitical tension; focus remains on HK Art Basel (March 27-29, 2026) as Asia's premier hub.
art_market.key_trends: Introduction of 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' digital art sectors; landmark 5-year deal between HK government and Art Basel.
art_market.recent_events: Preview days approaching (March 25-26); M+ Museum projections and public art initiatives launching; high dealer/institutional focus.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Bearish following March 23 sharp downturn; investors reactive to escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and oil price volatility.
stock_market.key_factors: Hang Seng Index impacted by regional risk-off sentiment; investors prioritizing defensive/alternative assets; market awaiting stabilization.
